title: logfia arvensis
intro: Logfia arvensis, also known as corn-tilt or lesser cornflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Logfia arvensis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
